# Generated by quick cmake


cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.2)
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION true)
set(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES "Debug;Release" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM "x64" CACHE INTERNAL "" FORCE)


project(example)
set (PROJECT_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../)
set (SOURCE_DIR ${PROJECT_DIR}/sources)
set (CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_DIR}/lib)
set (CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_DIR}/lib)
set (CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_DIR}/bin)
include_directories(${SOURCE_DIR})


# module only_debug
FILE(GLOB only_debug ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_debug/include.h)
FILE(GLOB only_debug_test_folder ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_debug/test_folder/output_utils.h ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_debug/test_folder/output_utils.cc)
source_group("sources" FILES ${only_debug})
source_group("sources\\test_folder" FILES ${only_debug_test_folder})
add_library(only_debug STATIC ${only_debug}  ${only_debug_test_folder} ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_debug/build.py)
target_include_directories(only_debug PRIVATE ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_debug)
set_target_properties(only_debug PROPERTIES LINKER_LANGUAGE CXX)


# module only_release
FILE(GLOB only_release ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_release/include.h)
FILE(GLOB only_release_test_folder ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_release/test_folder/output_utils.h ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_release/test_folder/output_utils.cc)
source_group("sources" FILES ${only_release})
source_group("sources\\test_folder" FILES ${only_release_test_folder})
add_library(only_release STATIC ${only_release}  ${only_release_test_folder} ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_release/build.py)
target_include_directories(only_release PRIVATE ${SOURCE_DIR}/only_release)
set_target_properties(only_release PROPERTIES LINKER_LANGUAGE CXX)


# module configuration_lib
FILE(GLOB configuration_lib ${SOURCE_DIR}/configuration_lib/configuration_lib.cc)
source_group("sources" FILES ${configuration_lib})
add_library(configuration_lib STATIC ${configuration_lib} ${SOURCE_DIR}/configuration_lib/build.py)
target_include_directories(configuration_lib PRIVATE ${SOURCE_DIR}/configuration_lib)
target_link_libraries(configuration_lib debug only_debug)
target_link_libraries(configuration_lib optimized only_release)
set_target_properties(configuration_lib PROPERTIES LINKER_LANGUAGE CXX)


# module default_party
FILE(GLOB default_party ${SOURCE_DIR}/default_party/default_party.h ${SOURCE_DIR}/default_party/defaut_party.cc)
source_group("sources" FILES ${default_party})
add_library(default_party STATIC ${default_party} ${SOURCE_DIR}/default_party/build.py)
target_include_directories(default_party PRIVATE ${SOURCE_DIR}/default_party)
set_target_properties(default_party PROPERTIES LINKER_LANGUAGE CXX)


# module test_bin
FILE(GLOB test_bin ${SOURCE_DIR}/test_bin/test_bin.cc)
source_group("sources" FILES ${test_bin})
add_executable(test_bin ${test_bin} ${SOURCE_DIR}/test_bin/build.py)
target_include_directories(test_bin PRIVATE ${SOURCE_DIR}/test_bin)
target_include_directories(test_bin PUBLIC ${PROJECT_DIR}/third_parties/default_party/include)
target_link_libraries(test_bin general configuration_lib)
target_link_libraries(test_bin debug only_debug)
target_link_libraries(test_bin optimized only_release ${PROJECT_DIR}/third_parties/default_party/lib/default_party.lib)
add_custom_command(TARGET test_bin PRE_BUILD COMMAND E:/Work/quick_cmakeV2/quick_cmake/example/quick_cmake_1.0.exe --workspace E:/Work/quick_cmakeV2/quick_cmake/example --module=test_bin --pre_build)
add_custom_command(TARGET test_bin POST_BUILD COMMAND E:/Work/quick_cmakeV2/quick_cmake/example/quick_cmake_1.0.exe --workspace E:/Work/quick_cmakeV2/quick_cmake/example --module=test_bin --post_build)
set_target_properties(test_bin PROPERTIES LINKER_LANGUAGE CXX)
